reason: Verify every accepted requirement, especially strict Codex scope, fixed 180s timing, selected prompt_cache_key/Session_id lineage identity, and the exact 10000/8000/500 contract.
Review eligibility before Redis, one request-scoped decision, atomic no-refresh cycle, response-before-flush mutation, and rollback behavior.
Check ordered execution, unresolved-decision gate, validation commands, and high-risk integration points.
Confirm adjusted usage follows the expression contract: p includes reclassified cache tokens, cr is zero, len is unchanged.
Audit Codex signals, original request/header availability, request idempotency, retry state, and deep-copy ownership.
Verify native Responses bodies and all usage-bearing terminal SSE events are patched before client emission.
Verify Chat-to-Responses conversion applies the shared policy once and preserves unknown/remaining usage fields.
Verify Gemini metadata is adjusted before Responses projection and settlement uses the same snapshot.
Verify user/channel settlement and consume logs use adjusted public values without corrupting original telemetry or cache-creation inference.
Verify tiered_expr owner inputs and unchanged context length with exact assertions.
Use only current Responses-specific symbol hazards; reject archived scope, interval, identity, and fail-mode decisions that conflict with PRD/design.
